theme: Light theme preferred (with Soft Utility / Clean Tech aesthetic).

typography.body: IBM Plex Sans (Highly readable, CS/Coding vibe)
typography.mono: JetBrains Mono (For code blocks or small labels)
rules: Overlines/Labels must be uppercase, tracking-[0.2em] and text-xs.
Variable weights used for emphasis instead of standard bold.

colors.archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast mixed with Soft Utility
rules: Avoid muddy gray transparency. DO NOT use complete transparent background in header, overlays, any surface that has content under it.
Use primary color for CTAs sparingly.

surfaces: Glassmorphism for Sticky Headers (bg-white/80, backdrop-blur-xl, 1px bottom border border-black/5).
Cards: Flat solid background, 1px border-border, no shadow. Hover: slight lift -translate-y-1, subtle shadow-lg, border color darkens.
Grid Borders: Expose the skeleton for lesson grids.
textures: Subtle grain/noise overlay on the hero section for a tactile feel.
Dotted grid background pattern for the 'Computer Science' vibe.

grids.marketing_home: MODE A: 'Tetris' Grid. gap-8. Mix Hero spans (col-span-full md:col-span-8 row-span-2) with supporting squares.
grids.dashboard_admin: MODE B: High Density Grid. gap-6. Full height children.
rules: Direct children only for grid items.

layouts.hero_section: Bento layout featuring teacher photo, welcome text, and quick stats (16 років стажу, вища категорія).
layouts.class_navigation: Modular cards for grades 5-9. Clear, touch-friendly.
layouts.lesson_page: Clean and Simple design. Video player dominant, with sidebar or tabbed sections for Homework, Presentation, Extra Materials.
layouts.admin_dashboard: Sidebar navigation. Dense table layouts for CRUD operations. No unnecessary cards.

rules: Micro-animations on all interactive elements (hover, active, focus).
Staggered entrance animations for lesson lists.
Focus states must have higher contrast than default state.
Include data-testid on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='lesson-card-5').

images.description: Portrait of a teacher standing in front of a blackboard, used for the Hero section to establish trust and authority.
Students focused on computers, used for the 'About Classes' or generic background.
Abstract coding background, used for tech accents or banner backgrounds.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the frontend using React (JS), Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI.
Ensure all routing works perfectly for Home -> Class -> Lesson.
For the admin panel, implement a secure login and a dashboard with a data table for lessons (CRUD).
Implement a global search bar in the header that filters lessons/topics.
Do NOT use HTML inputs for complex forms; use Shadcn Form components.
Do NOT center align the app container in App.css.
Do NOT use universal transition 'transition: all'.
Use named exports for components and default exports for pages.
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for marketing/home page layouts, avoiding rigid Shadcn Cards where asymmetry is needed.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations separate good from extraordinary.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
